title: Mannequin Wearing Asymmetric Skirt and Minimalist Accessories on Plain Background
description: Wide shot of a mannequin dressed in a black turtleneck top paired with a dark gray asymmetric skirt featuring an uneven hemline. The outfit is complemented by minimalist gold jewelry and ankle boots, set against a plain light gray backdrop. The image is evenly lit with sharp focus, highlighting the skirt design and accessories in a clean and elegant studio setting.
